Summary for marker tests.

# Examples

## Default variant
<!-- default -->
<!-- preview -->
```rust
view! { <div data-testid="default-variant">"default"</div> }
```

## Live preview only
<!-- preview -->
```rust
view! { <div data-testid="live-variant">"live"</div> }
```

## Code only
<!-- code-only -->
```rust
view! { <div>"hidden"</div> }
```
